title: Education of a bibliophile oral history transcript
creator: Carpenter, Edwin H., interviewee
Axe, Ruth Frey, interviewer
University of California, Los Angeles. Oral History Program
description: Transcript of a 7.5-hour interview completed under the auspices of the UCLA Oral History Program

Carpenter discusses his associations with UCLA and the Huntington Library, and local collectors and collections, including his own. He also describes seminars he attended at UCLA and the founding of the UCLA Anthropological Society
The Bancroft Library, University of California, Berkeley

The UCLA Oral History Program : catalog of the collection / compiled by Constance S. Bullock (Los Angeles : Oral History Program, University of California, Los Angeles, 1982) is available in the UCLA Dept. of Special Collections
Forms part of: Oral History collection, Dept. of Special Collections, University Library, University of California, Los Angeles
